reasons.description: Weather signal is building: smoke / overcast clouds

reasons.description: Historical disruption patterns show this lane slows early once congestion starts

decision.objective: Protect the promised delivery window before disruption compounds
decision.whyNow: Delay probability is 58% in the next 18-24 hours. Southern Relief is the safest route before congestion cascades.

alert.headline: Predictive disruption alert
alert.message: Risk detected on Mumbai, Maharashtra, India to Delhi, India. Switch to Southern Relief now. Potential delay: 2h 24m. Tap to approve.

translations.en: Risk detected on Mumbai, Maharashtra, India to Delhi, India. Switch to Southern Relief now. Potential delay: 2h 24m. Tap to approve.
translations.hi: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India se Delhi, India route par risk mila. Switch to Southern Relief now. Delay 2h 24m ho sakta hai. Approve karein.

explanation.title: Predicted disruption needs action
explanation.summary: ClearPath predicts a likely disruption between Mumbai, Maharashtra, India and Delhi, India in the next 18-24 hours. Priya should approve Southern Relief now to protect the promised delivery.
explanation.cause: Combined signal: smoke / overcast clouds with rising traffic pressure.
reasoning: Gemini sees a 49% disruption risk on the active route before the truck reaches the chokepoint.
Southern Relief has the lowest route risk at 25% with 77% reliability.
Cascade impact is low because 7 downstream commitments can slip.

statusMessage: Using best available estimate. ClearPath is still generating a decision-ready alert.

explanation.title: Predicted disruption needs action
explanation.summary: Your shipment may be delayed due to heavy rainfall risk detected along the route and congestion. Switching to Southern Relief can reduce the delay risk and protect the delivery window by about 3h 15m.
explanation.cause: Combined signal: Heavy rainfall risk detected along the route with rising traffic pressure.
reasoning: Risk is 67% because bad weather and congestion are building together.
Southern Relief is safer because it has lower route risk and better ETA protection.
Priya should approve the route change now to avoid a later delay.
